Calendula Cream

✓ In Stock

Nourish and restore sensitive, dry or irritated skin — a healing blend of calendula and chamomile to soothe redness and comfort your skin.

50ml Glass Pump Bottle — $18

Product Options

Ingredients

Purified Water, Avocado Oil (Persea gratissima), Sweet Almond Oil (Prunus dulcis), Soybean Oil (Glycine max), Calendula Flowers (Calendula officinalis), Cetearyl Alcohol, PE-20 Stearate, Cocoa Butter (Theobroma cacao), Glycerine, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Rosehip Oil (Rosa canina), Jojoba Oil (Simmondsia chinensis), Chamomile Essential Oil (Matricaria chamomilla), Natural Vitamin E, Propanediol and Rosemary Leaf Extract (Salvia rosmarinus)

Sourced from multiple origins

Important Information

For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. Not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
